name: --file
-f
--makefile
options.description: Read FILE as a makefile

name: -C
--directory
options.description: Change to DIRECTORY before doing anything

name: -B
--always-make
options.description: Unconditionally make all targets

name: -e
--environment-overrides
options.description: Environment variables override makefiles

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this message and exit

name: -i
--ignore-errors
options.description: Ignore errors from commands

name: -k
--keep-going
options.description: Keep going when some targets can't be made

name: -L
--check-symlink-times
options.description: Use the latest mtime between symlinks and target

name: -p
--print-data-base
options.description: Print make's internal database

name: -q
--question
options.description: Run no commands; exit status says if up to date

name: -r
--no-builtin-rules
options.description: Disable the built-in implicit rules

name: -R
--no-builtin-variables
options.description: Disable the built-in variable settings

name: -t
--touch
options.description: Touch targets instead of remaking them

name: -v
--version
options.description: Print the version number of make and exit

name: -w
--print-directory
options.description: Print the current directory

options.name: -d
options.description: Print lots of debugging information

options.name: --debug
options.description: Print various types of debugging information

name: -I
--include-dir
options.description: Search directory for included makefiles

name: -l
--load-average
options.description: Don't start multiple jobs unless load is below N

name: -o
--old-file
options.description: Consider file to be very old and don't remake it

options.name: --no-print-directory
options.description: Turn off -w, even if it was turned on implicitly

name: -W
--what-if
--new-file
--assume-new
options.description: Consider file to be infinitely new

options.name: --warn-undefined-variables
options.description: Warn when an undefined variable is referenced

name: -N
--Next-option
options.description: Turn on value of next option
